name: Micro Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch microwavable quiche dish or round cake dish, combine oil, onion, garlic, zucchini, and pepper; stir to coat veggies with oil.
2. Microwave, uncovered at high (100%) for 4 to 6 minutes, or until softened, stirring part way through.
3. Lightly beat eggs with seasoning; stir in cheese.
4. Pour egg mixture over vegetables; stir until mixed.
5. Microwave, uncovered at medium-high (70%), for 3 minutes.
6. Stir the mixture with a fork, moving cooked parts from outer edges toward the center of the dish.
7. Continue microwaving at medium-high for 3-5 minutes, or until frittata is set.
8. Let stand on counter flat for 5 minutes before serving. Makes four servings.
